device.approveDescription: A new device wants to connect to your admin account. Only approve if you started this request yourself.

approved.title: Device approved
approved.description: The connecting device has been granted admin access. You can close this tab.

device.approveError: Couldn't approve that device. Try again.

denied.title: Device denied
denied.description: The connecting device will not be granted access. You can close this tab.

device.denyError: Couldn't deny that device. Try again.
device.enterCodeDescription: The device that initiated this request will display a short code. Open the link it provided, or paste the code into the URL as <0>?user_code=YOURCODE</0>.

login.createDescription: Create a new account to get started
login.signinHint: Already have an account? Sign In
login.ssoFailed: Couldn't start SSO sign-in. Try again.
login.ssoRequiredDescription: This server only allows SSO sign-in. Use the sign-in page to continue.
login.ssoUnavailable: SSO-only sign-in is enabled, but no SSO provider is available. Ask an administrator to check the SSO environment variables.
login.unableToConnectDescription: We couldn't reach the server. Try again.

errors.accountAlreadyRegistered: That email is already registered. Try signing in.
errors.couldNotCreateAccount: Couldn't create that account. Try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: That email or password doesn't match.
errors.invalidSlug: Use 3-63 lowercase letters or numbers, with single internal hyphens only.
errors.invalidTotp: That code didn't work. Check your authenticator and try again.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Enter the code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.emailCodeDescription: Enter the code we just emailed you
twoFactor.codeSent: We've emailed you a verification code
twoFactor.couldNotSendCode: Couldn't send a code. Try again.
twoFactor.requiredDescription: Your organization requires two-factor authentication. Please set it up to continue.
twoFactor.introText: You'll need an authenticator app like Authy, Google Authenticator, or 1Password to generate verification codes.
twoFactor.passwordPrompt: Enter your password to begin setup.
twoFactor.scanQrPrompt: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
twoFactor.addKeyToApp: Add this key to your authenticator app:
